Zurp Check-In — Tue Apr 21, 2026 (1:30 PM ET)
Refund policy set: — Charge customer $50 for charger use, refund battery fees once batteries are retu
Tiered partner pricing: — Year 1 = 70/30 split, stepping to 50/50 by Year 3.
Go-to-market shift: — Moving off mass email → targeted outreach through known contacts. Team to map pe
Shipment timeline: — New units land ~Apr 28, customs adds 7–10 days, so useable inventory ~May 10.
Referral program: — Framework being decided to formally onboard Santi and incentivize venue intros.
Nik — Follow Nathan/Nowhere Thurs. Paperwork w/ Troy on Virgo licensing. Maintain/upda
Rameez — Compile + share venue contacts/logos to map known relationships. Share shipment
Troy — Follow Miles @ Virgo on venue + licensing. Escalate Ashish non-response on merch
Dil — Send photos of 8-unit machine for planning. Keep CRM + machinery tracking curren
Jim — Communicate refund timing to customer, confirm with Nikki when batteries return.
Minul — (standing) payments dashboard updates (per Slack thread today).
